description: Compact ledger that ties iron-triangle capacity, quality-target spend, and slotted work-item costs into a stacked-bar plan view. Auto-binds via data-bind-triangle and data-bind-quality.

attributes.name: data-bind-triangle
attributes.description: ID of a sibling <iron-triangle> to read capacityPoints from

attributes.name: data-bind-quality
attributes.description: ID of a sibling <quality-target> to read criticalSum from

slots.name: (default)
slots.description: Slot any elements with data-capacity-cost (notably <work-item>) and the plan sums them as the feature spend

events.name: capacity-plan:overdrawn
events.description: Fires when the slack crosses zero in either direction (edge-triggered)
